text: I want to kill myself and I have a plan.
I've decided to end my life tonight.
I'm going to commit suicide, I already know how.
I don't want to be alive anymore and I'm ready to act on it.
I have pills in front of me and I'm thinking of taking all of them.
I think everyone would be better off without me around.
I've been thinking about disappearing permanently.
Sometimes I wish I could just go to sleep and not wake up.
I feel like I'm just a burden to everyone in my life.
I keep imagining what things would be like if I wasn't here anymore.
I had a great week actually — oh wait no, I've been thinking about ending things.
My grades are fine I guess but honestly I've been researching methods to hurt myself.
Everything seems okay on the outside but inside I've been planning to not be here anymore.
I laughed today for the first time in weeks. But tonight I'm thinking about ending it.
My friends think I'm doing better. I'm not. I've been writing goodbye notes.
I'm not thinking about hurting myself, but I have been thinking about how it would feel to just... not be here.
It's not like I want to die, I just don't want to keep living like this.
I haven't done anything, but I keep looking up information about overdoses.
I'm not suicidal or anything, I just fantasize about getting into an accident.
Don't worry about me, I just keep thinking that everyone would be relieved if I wasn't around.
